Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood is present. Represented by Zakiya Moten.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brittany Tuck is present.
Attorney Josephine Alioto representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB 9, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
